  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AllocationGreedy
    Simple greedy: iterate students; for each, pick first acceptable free project.
    HallChecker
    Brute-force Hall's condition for small n: for all nonempty S ⊆ Students, |N(S)| ≥ |S|.
    Main
     
    Main
     
    Person
    Abstract base for Student and Teacher.
    Problem
    Holds arrays of students, teachers, projects.
    Project
    Project identified by a unique code and a type; at most one student assigned.
    ProjectType
    Project types: theoretical or practical.
    Student
    Student with regNo and acceptable projects (array).
    Teacher
    Teacher proposes projects.
